summary: Routed AudioPlaybackButton.accessibilityText and VoiceCaptureButton.accessibilityText through Localizable.strings. Added 8 new keys (audio.playback.accessibility.{play,stop,error} + voice.capture.accessibility.{start,stop,transcribing,finished,error}) across all 19 locales with LLM-drafted translations. Two keys (audio.playback.accessibility.error and voice.capture.accessibility.error) carry a %@ format specifier wrapping the runtime error message; the call sites use String.localizedStringWithFormat. Approach mirrors the existing HomeAccessibilityLabels pattern. Build green, parity 19/324/13.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-a11y-buttons-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.contract: Accessibility-string routing for DesignSystem audio/voice buttons
contract_status_changes.before: AudioPlaybackButton.accessibilityText and VoiceCaptureButton.accessibilityText returned hardcoded English from switch statements. Non-English VoiceOver users heard English regardless of system language.
contract_status_changes.after: Both computed properties route through NSLocalizedString with comments. Error cases use String.localizedStringWithFormat with the new %@-bearing keys. Translations exist for all 19 locales (LLM-drafted).

residual_risks: VoiceOver runtime output per locale was not verified. Native reviewer should check that the LLM-drafted accessibility labels read correctly aloud.

The %@ error messages themselves (AudioPlayerService 'Recording not found.' / 'Could not play recording.') are NOT localized — only the surrounding 'Playback error: %@' / 'Error: %@' wrapper is. A future slice could localize the inner messages too.

The 8 new keys join the 316 prior keys at draft-translation quality. Each per-locale review return file currently snapshots 356 entries from 2026-05-15; the 8 new keys are NOT reflected there. STATUS.md / LQA.md will report stale counts until those derived artifacts are regenerated (out of scope of this slice).
Native review of any locale remains outstanding. app-localization-native-review-intake is still blocked.

The widget extension does not currently use AudioPlaybackButton or VoiceCaptureButton, so no widget-target localization concerns. If a future widget uses them, ensure the widget bundle correctly loads Localizable.strings.
recommended_next_reason: The visible/accessibility shell routing pass is now complete to the build-tested gate. Remaining queued work is app-localization-string-interpolation-formatters (~12 interpolated copy sites) plus the standing blocked app-localization-native-review-intake. Clean stop is valid.
